Arodor is in the Dome of the Sun, writing resolutions recently decided by the Council of Gondor.

Arodor is in the Dome of the Sun.
You have agreed to deliver resolutions of the Council to several leaders of the city throughout Minas Tirith: Torchún, the Warden of the Houses of Hea…

Arodor is in the Dome of the Sun, on the Sixth Circle of Minas Tirith. Thalhír asked you to deliver Parthadan's grim report to Arodor for filing.
